## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences. Link any related issue: Closes #NNN -->

## Type

- [ ] Content / docs (English)
- [ ] Translation (`docs/<lang>/…`)
- [ ] Design / theme (CSS, components)
- [ ] Build / CI / infrastructure
- [ ] Fix (typo, broken link, wrong data)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run docs:build` passes locally
- [ ] English changes start in `docs/en/` (source of truth)
- [ ] Cultural rules preserved: **KEVIN** in ALL CAPS, `mikeinspace` lowercase, Trinity narrative accurate
- [ ] No em dashes in prose (use commas, colons, or parentheses)
- [ ] Protocol facts (block heights, versions, SRC standards) match the source of truth (indexer `config.py` / chain), not guessed
- [ ] Translations keep technical tokens verbatim and are ready for native review

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: screenshots for design changes, sources for factual claims, etc. -->
